title: Bare Bones Simple PBR
body:
This resourcepack is an extension of barebones that add Pbr materials for barebones, it does the same thing as ABBPBR but with textures more up to date with the latest verisions of bare bones

If you don't know what PBR is, it is a way to give extra properties to the materials when using shaders. If it dosen't work then you might need to enable PBR in the shader your using.

The shader used in all the screenshots is the nostalgia shader but if you use it, it won't look the exact same because of my shader settings

Disclaimer: Not good for performance

Use the normal barebones pack under this pack for it to work
